allow: Bash(python -c "from game import Tetris, Block, BLOCK_SHAPES, BLOCK_NAMES; g = Tetris\(\); g.next_block\(\); print\(f''Block: {BLOCK_NAMES[g.block.type]}, cells: {g.block.cells}''\); print\(f''Queue: {[BLOCK_NAMES[b.type] for b in g.queue]}''\); print\(f''Field rows: {len\(g.field\)}, cols: {len\(g.field[0]\)}''\); g.hold\(\); print\(f''Hold: {BLOCK_NAMES[g.hold_block.type]}, new block: {BLOCK_NAMES[g.block.type]}''\); print\(''rotate_ccw test:''\); b = Block\(0\); print\(f''I rot before: {b.rotation}''\); b.rotate_ccw\(\); print\(f''I rot after ccw: {b.rotation} \(expect 1 since I has 2 rotations\)''\); b.rotate_cw\(\); print\(f''I rot after cw back: {b.rotation}''\)")

Bash(cmd.exe /c "py -c ""from game import Tetris, Block, BLOCK_NAMES; g = Tetris\(\); g.next_block\(\); print\(''Block:'', BLOCK_NAMES[g.block.type]\); print\(''Queue:'', [BLOCK_NAMES[b.type] for b in g.queue]\); g.hold\(\); print\(''Hold:'', BLOCK_NAMES[g.hold_block.type]\); b = Block\(3\); b.rotate_ccw\(\); print\(''J ccw from 0:'', b.rotation\); print\(''OK''\)""")

Bash(cmd /c "py -c ""from game import Tetris, Block, BLOCK_NAMES; g = Tetris\(\); g.next_block\(\); print\(''Block:'', BLOCK_NAMES[g.block.type]\); print\(''Queue:'', [BLOCK_NAMES[b.type] for b in g.queue]\); g.hold\(\); print\(''Hold:'', BLOCK_NAMES[g.hold_block.type]\); b = Block\(3\); b.rotate_ccw\(\); print\(''J ccw from 0:'', b.rotation\); print\(''OK''\)""")
